query:
SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.title, c.genre, COUNT(cs.id) as shot_count
FROM campaigns c
JOIN campaign_shots cs ON cs.campaignId = c.id
WHERE cs.videoStatus = 'complete' AND cs.videoUrl IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.title, c.genre
ORDER BY c.id;
command:
